title: Hiring Store Manager at MTR Foods Capital India

jsonLd.title: Hiring Store Manager at MTR Foods Capital India
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with MTR Foods Capital India! We are hiring a Store Manager for our Lucknow team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About MTR Foods Capital India:
MTR Foods Capital India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MTR Foods Capital India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
